situation: I need to tell my engineering team that a feature we committed to is getting cut this quarter, and I want them to trust the reasoning, not just accept the decision.
notes: Canonical headline case. Good recall on all axes. Noise: celebratory qualifies via four matches of 'not'. pragmatic-architect leads voice on genuinely topical tokens. See probe verdict: GOOD. Full analysis in recommender-quality-probe.md.
reconstruction: verbatim from README Quick Start, SKILL.md, and docs/internal/entry-recommender-spec.md - identical across all three sources, round-trip verified.

situation: We are laying off 10 percent of all staff; an internal company announcement.
notes: P-4: candid, empathetic, confessional score zero because no stable entry carries layoff/restructuring vocabulary. P-6: 'all' and 'off' alone qualify resolute via junk matches in tells/facets - two stopword-candidate tokens. Format nail it. Probe verdict: MIXED.
reconstruction: reconstructed from recorded tokens; round-trip verified. Original text not preserved in audit directory.

situation: Write a note to a close friend, absolutely not corporate or formal, no business jargon, just casual.
notes: P-2: reverent ranks #1 in tone (22.63) matching 'casual' and 'formal' in its own contrastive tells - anti-correct top rank. The correct answer (playful) IS present in the 13 qualifying tones, so Step 2 can recover. resume, cover-letter, memo, press-release qualify on 'formal' - the registers the user excluded. P-6: no/not contribute junk matches across 20+ rows. Probe verdict: INVERTED TOP RANK.
reconstruction: reconstructed from recorded tokens; round-trip verified. Original text not preserved in audit directory.

situation: Explain how kubernetes autoscaling works to an eight year old child.
notes: P-4: child/eight/kubernetes/autoscaling match nothing in voice/tone because no entries carry audience-descriptor language. diataxis-explanation is a genuine catch (style). P-6: 'how' was a candidate for the stopwords list but here it catches the diataxis-explanation match via facet text - load-bearing. Do NOT remove 'how' from STOPWORDS without checking this case first. Probe verdict: HONEST LOW-CONFIDENCE.
reconstruction: reconstructed from recorded tokens; round-trip verified. Original text not preserved in audit directory.

situation: Production checkout was down for four hours; write a blameless postmortem for this outage that took.
notes: P-3: postmortem format scores 34.9 (blameless/outage/production) - gold result. But pragmatic-architect, whose when_to_use literally contains 'postmortem', dies at distinct_matches=1 (gate requires 2). Gold singleton killed by a gate that cannot distinguish rare-topical from incidental. P-6: 'took' alone qualified celebratory in probe (highest scoring non-qualifying tone at 20.86 via when_to_use/tells/facets match). The canonical compose-guide combo (operator/skeptical/problem-solution) is entirely invisible. Probe verdict: PRECISION SHOWCASE + GATE COST.
reconstruction: reconstructed from recorded tokens; round-trip verified. Original text not preserved in audit directory.

situation: Write hero copy for a landing page for a developer tool that automates database migrations.
notes: P-4: formats are exactly right (product-description, ad-copy, landing-page). No voice/tone/style qualifies because no marketer-adjacent voice exists among the 15 and tone/style fields carry no landing-page vocabulary. This register is squarely inside the PMs-and-builders beachhead. Honest low-confidence on three axes. Probe verdict: HONEST + CATALOG GAP.

situation: Write something nice for my coworker.
notes: All-zeros case. AC-7 low-confidence path fires as designed. Three tokens, none topically distinctive enough to clear the bar on any axis. 'something' reaches score threshold on empathetic in tone (11.61) but fails distinct_matches=1 gate. The verbatim text is the only probe original that survived: quoted in payload-redesign-proposal.md line 31. Probe verdict: CORRECT.
reconstruction: verbatim from payload-redesign-proposal.md line 31 - the only probe original to survive. Round-trip verified.

situation: Writing an excited but understated product announcement - no hype, stays minimal.
notes: P-2: celebratory and playful top tone despite 'no hype, stays understated' - both qualify via 'product' + the exclusion token 'no'. matter-of-fact (the natural pick) is invisible - its fields never say 'understated' or 'hype'. Step 2 must treat matches on excluded words as evidence against, not for. Probe verdict: INVERTED TOP RANK.

situation: My boss asked before the Thursday meeting about the budget and pricing update, but he changed what he basically means - the finance committee vendor story - so now ideally he can put something together in two minutes he can skim, right? Who left for Europe? He is traveling and kind of long, together.
notes: P-5: 34 tokens qualify 11/15 voices and 38/52 formats - score mass scales with matching-token count while threshold stays absolute at 3.0. Longest and least discriminating shortlist in the probe. P-6: many tokens are common content words with low IDF. If a scorer change adds length normalization or raises the threshold, this case should show the largest reduction in qualifying count. Probe verdict: DILUTION CONFIRMED.
reconstruction: reconstructed from recorded tokens using only words that tokenize to the target set or are STOPWORDS; round-trip verified. Original text not preserved in audit directory.
